core_idea: Firefist Office Survivor Gregor is a Damage Dealer / Status Specialist / Support — **Counter: I have to keep going for big sis** grants **District 12 Fuel** at Combat Start, making the guard slot part of the damage rotation. Scaling conditions: +1% per District 12 Fuel consumed; +3% per District 12 Fuel consumed. Support passive (**I'm the only survivor…**) applies when allies **land hits** — keep this unit on field through the opening turn so damage dealers can act.
playstyle_guide:
- **I'm the only survivor…** triggers **On Hit** — protect this slot and let allies attack each turn before expecting heals or buffs to flow.
- **Counter: I have to keep going for big sis** grants 100 **District 12 Fuel** at Combat Start — use the defense slot to prep buffs before your attack chain.
- Manage **District 12 Fuel** — multiple skills spend limited ammo on coin flips. Preserve **District 12 Fuel** for S3; when reserves are low, skip or pass on weaker S1, S2 so your strongest skill keeps fully empowered coins.
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: +1% per District 12 Fuel consumed.

**S1 — Flamethrow** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Low / Slightly High stacked).
- Scales Coin Power with Burn stacks — apply liberally before committing (cap +2).
- Consume 15 District 12 Fuel and inflict +1 Burn Count

**S2 — I'll burn away every last drop of your filthy blood** (BP 4, CP +6, x2): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low / Extremely High stacked).
- Scales Coin Power with Burn stacks — apply liberally before committing (cap +2).
- Inflict +1 Burn Count; [On Hit] Consume 10 District 12 Fuel and inflict +1 Burn Count against 2 enemies that have the least Burn Count

**S3 — Firefist** (BP 5, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 5, high 17 (Average / Extremely High stacked).
- Scales Coin Power with Burn stacks — apply liberally before committing (cap +2).
- If this unit consumed District 12 Fuel, inflict 1 Burn and +1 Burn Count

Combat passive — **District 12 Special Workshop Fuel**: Begin Encounters with 100 District 12 Fuel.
  - At over 50 Stack, become District 12 Fuel.
  - At 50 or less Stack, any District 12 Fuel becomes Overheated Fuel.

Defense skill — **Counter: I have to keep going for big sis**: [Clashable Counter].
  - [Combat Start] Gain 100 District 12 Fuel.
team_suggestions: Flexible pick; slotting alongside identities whose support passives provide relevant statuses or SP recovery maximises uptime. The support passive also benefits teammates directly — consider this identity even in compositions where it is not the primary damage dealer.
- **Cinq Assoc. East Section 3 Don Quixote**: 'Featherstride Technique' inflicts Burn via the support passive — scales off Burn count/potency on the target.
- **Liu Assoc. South Section 3 Yi Sang**: 'Liu Defensive Square' inflicts Burn via the support passive — scales off Burn count/potency on the target.
- **Liu Assoc. South Section 4 Director Rodion**: This identity's 'I'm the only survivor…' inflicts Burn — Liu Assoc. South Section 4 Director Rodion scales off Burn.
